summary: A simple, mobile-first inventory management web app for a small shop (POS-style). Features predefined cigarette products (Marlboro Silver, Marlboro Gold, Parliament Silver, Parliament Platinium, Parliament Superslim), add stock flow, record sale flow, password-protected inventory view and daily sales report, admin reset, and persistent local storage. UI is button-based with minimal typing, dark/light modern style.
architectural_notes: Mobile-first, button-based UI with minimal typing — large tap targets suitable for shop workers
Predefined products: Marlboro Silver, Marlboro Gold, Parliament Silver, Parliament Platinium, Parliament Superslim
Single shared password 'gulserxan' for Inventory View, Daily Sales Report, and Admin Reset
Persistent storage via localStorage or lightweight backend; data must survive restarts
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Shop/retail app logo icon — a simple stylized cash register or shop bag silhouette on a dark background, warm amber accent (shop-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Build the main dashboard home screen with 5 large, tappable buttons: Add Stock, Record Sale, View Inventory, Daily Sales Report, Reset Inventory. The dashboard must be mobile-first with full-width buttons easy to tap with a thumb.

Build the Add Stock flow screen: Step 1 — select product using large buttons (one per product). Step 2 — select quantity using buttons: +10, +20, +50. Step 3 — select purchase price using buttons: 0.50, 0.60, 0.70, plus a manual numeric input field. Step 4 — confirm to submit. Show a success confirmation after update.

Build the Record Sale flow screen: Step 1 — select product using large buttons. Step 2 — select quantity using buttons: -1, -2, -5, -10. Step 3 — select selling price using buttons: 9 AZN, 10 AZN, 11 AZN, 12 AZN. Step 4 — confirm to submit. Display an error if stock is insufficient. Show success confirmation on completion.

Build the password-protected Inventory View screen. When the user taps 'View Inventory' on the dashboard, show a password entry prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', display a clean list of all 5 products with their current stock quantity. Show an error for wrong password.

Build the password-protected Daily Sales Report screen. When the user taps 'Daily Sales Report', show a password prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', display today's sales summary: list of products sold today, total quantity sold per product, and total revenue for today.

Build the Admin Reset flow. When the user taps 'Reset Inventory', show a password prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', show a confirmation dialog warning that all stock will be set to zero. On confirmation, call the backend reset function and show a success message.

Apply a clean, modern dark-themed visual design across all screens. Use a dark background (near-black or very dark gray) with high-contrast white or light-gray text. Accent color should be a warm amber/orange tone to evoke a shop/retail feel. All buttons must be large, with generous padding and rounded corners. Typography must be large and legible. The layout must be mobile-first (single-column, full-width elements) with a consistent header showing the app name and a back button on sub-screens.

new_feature_requests.summary: Dashboard with large buttons: Add Stock, Record Sale, View Inventory, Daily Sales Report, Reset Inventory
Add Stock flow: select product, quantity (+10/+20/+50), purchase price (0.50/0.60/0.70 + manual input)
Record Sale flow: select product, quantity (-1/-2/-5/-10), selling price (9/10/11/12 AZN), stock validation, save sale record
Password-protected Inventory View showing product list with remaining quantities (password: gulserxan)
Password-protected Daily Sales Report showing products sold today, total qty per product, total revenue (password: gulserxan)
Admin Reset to zero all stock quantities (password: gulserxan)
Persistent data storage (localStorage or lightweight backend) surviving app restarts

Define 5 predefined products in the backend: Marlboro Silver, Marlboro Gold, Parliament Silver, Parliament Platinium, Parliament Superslim. Each product must store: name, quantity in stock (integer), and last purchase price (float). Persist all data in stable storage so it survives canister restarts.

Implement an Add Stock backend function: accepts product name, quantity to add (+10, +20, +50, or any positive integer), and purchase price. Increments the product's stock quantity and updates its last purchase price.

Implement a Record Sale backend function: accepts product name, quantity sold, selling price (AZN), and timestamp. Decreases product stock by the given quantity and saves a sale record (date, product, quantity, selling price). Reject the sale if stock is insufficient.
Implement a backend query to return all sale records from the current calendar day (today), grouped by product: total quantity sold per product and total revenue for today.
Implement an Admin Reset backend function: resets all product stock quantities to zero. This function must be callable only after password validation on the frontend (password: gulserxan).
